prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年郑州大学在海南省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约4141名→5143名→5945名→4713名→6580名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年位次6580名为近5年最高（ 数字最大），较2024年大幅后移约1867名，反映出当年报考热度下降或竞争格局变化。近3年（2023–2025）位次从5945后移至6580，累计后移约635名；2021–20 25年郑州大学在海南省综合科类招生计划均为90人，保持稳定。2026年计划缩减至87人，较2025年减少3人，缩招幅度约3.3%。计划小幅缩减理论上使竞争略 有缓解，位次数字有减小倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学是211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名从2021年第53名持续上升至2026年第44名，排名稳步提升，反映学校 综合实力不断增强，对考生吸引力有正面作用；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，但负面事件数较少（14件中仅1件负面），整体舆情 可控。2025年声誉评价亦为偏负面，主要涉及投档线异常信号（高关注），黑龙江考生以389分被录取引发社会讨论，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响。抖音热度总排名第8（高 热），短视频平台曝光量大，社会关注度高，对报考热度有正向拉动；郑州大学拥有多个优势学科，材料科学与工程、化学、临床医学等学科实力突出，对相关 专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔 医学等专业社会热度持续偏高，与郑州大学开设的计算机类、临床医学、自动化类等专业方向契合，有利于吸引高分考生。海南省2026年普通高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年6 7408人增加约10592人，增幅约15.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（90→87人）、学校软科排名持续上升（第44名）、抖音高热度的正面拉动，以及海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%带来的竞争加 剧，在2025年基准6580名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次约6500名，区间6000–7000名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6500名，区间6000–7000名。位次在区间下限（6000名以内）可重点冲刺一档的口腔医学、计算机科学与技术等王牌专业；位次在区间中部（6300–6700名）建议以二 档专业为主，如人工智能、自动化、数学类等；位次在区间上限（7000名附近）可考虑三档专业保底。由于2026年海南省考生大幅增加，竞争加剧，建议考生适当降低专业预期， 优先确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 4141 → 5143 → 5945 → 4713 → 6580, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 ranking of 6580 is the highest in the past 5 years (largest number), a significant backward shift of about 1867 places compared to 2024, reflecting a decrease in application popularity or changes in competition patterns. In the past 3 years (2023–2025), the ranking moved backward from 5945 to 6580, a cumulative shift of about 635 places. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for Zhengzhou University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category remained stable at 90 students. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 87 students, a decrease of 3 students from 2025, a reduction of about 3.3%. The slight reduction in the plan theoretically eases competition slightly, with a tendency for the ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength, which has a positive effect on attracting applicants. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management response incidents, but the number of negative incidents is small (only 1 out of 14), and the overall public opinion is controllable. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was also slightly negative, mainly due to abnormal signals in the admission score line (high attention), where a candidate from Heilongjiang was admitted with a score of 389, sparking social discussion, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and high social attention, positively boosting application heat. Zhengzhou University has multiple advantageous disciplines, with outstanding strengths in materials science and engineering, chemistry, clinical medicine, etc., which are attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, clinical medicine, and stomatology continue to have high social popularity, aligning with Zhengzhou University's offerings in computer science, clinical medicine, automation, etc., which helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,592 from 67,408 in 2025, an increase of about 15.7%. The significant growth in the candidate pool intensifies competition, putting upward pressure on the ranking number.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (90→87), the continuous rise in the Soft Science ranking (44th), the positive pull of high Douyin popularity, and the intensified competition due to a 15.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province, based on the 2025 benchmark of 6580, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 6500, with a range of 6000–7000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 6500, with a range of 6000–7000. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Stomatology and Computer Science and Technology. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (6300–6700) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 majors such as Artificial Intelligence, Automation, and Mathematics. Candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 7000) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Due to the significant increase in candidates in Hainan Province in 2026 and intensified competition, it is recommended that candidates appropriately lower their major expectations and prioritize admission.
